leadText: Minus (Japanese: マイナス Minus) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Minun.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III and IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Minus powers up with Plus . When a Pokémon with Minus enters into a Double Battle with a Pokémon with the Ability Plus, the user's Special Attack stat is increased by 50%. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Minus enters a battle and has an ally with Plus or Minus, the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon with Minus is increased by 50%. The move Magnetic Flux raises the Defense and Special Defense of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage, while the move Gear Up raises the Attack and Special Attack of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Minus has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Minus powers up with Plus . When a Pokémon with Minus enters into a Double Battle with a Pokémon with the Ability Plus, the user's Special Attack stat is increased by 50%. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Minus enters a battle and has an ally with Plus or Minus, the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon with Minus is increased by 50%. The move Magnetic Flux raises the Defense and Special Defense of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage, while the move Gear Up raises the Attack and Special Attack of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Special Attack if there is a Pokémon with the Plus ability. MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's Special Attack when a Pokémon with the Plus ability is nearby. B S L プラスの とくせいの ポケモンがいると とくこうがあがる MD GtI Raises Special Attack when an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is nearby. * If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Special Attack will go up! * S MD If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk goes up! MD RT DX If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk goes up.
